title: Evangelion ClearFile 30 promo itemsigned by Miyamura Yuko
display_title: Evangelion ClearFile 30 promo itemsigned by Miyamura Yuko
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion ClearFile (3.0 promo item)signed by Miyamura Yuko             Quote Post by Lacie » Sat May 11, 2013 6:11 pm I want to sell this as I'm more of a Rei fan than an Asuka fan (more like not at all...) but luckily I have a friend who is interested in buying so the problem now is, I don't know what price should I ask for. This Clear File is signed by Miyamuro Yuko, Asuka's Japanese VA. It is brand new despite being removed from its packaging as I did so to get is signed and I wanted to keep the other one in the set (it was a set of 2. The other one had the boys while this one has the girls. It's in excellent condition as it was carefully transferred to the 2 clear sleeves you see protecting it in the picture straight away when I got home (I got the item signed and put it back in it's packaging to protect it and removed it from the packaging once again when I got home). It is adressed to 'You' so change of ownership wont be an issue and it is a 'Limited Edition' EVA 3.30 merchindise sold to promote the movie. I think that's all. So, can anyone advise me on a good price for it or tell me how much you would pay for it? Pics: http://imageshack.us/f/23/imagerpzh.jpg/ http://imageshack.us/f/198/imageled.jpg/ Sorry for the poor photo quality

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun May 12, 2013 1:06 am As a seller I would ask myself things like: -What would be a fair price that I would be willing to accept for this, I'm assuming over purchase price. Now considering that this is a friend of yours is there wiggle room in that price? -How much of an Asuka fan are they? This can affect pricing if you know that that is a factor. -Is there any urgency to sell? I don't know where you're located so kind of difficult to offer you an estimate if different currencies are involved. Also I'm an Asuka fan so that will also skew things.

[]:             Quote Post by Lacie » Sun May 12, 2013 1:57 am AR-99 wrote: As a seller I would ask myself things like: -What would be a fair price that I would be willing to accept for this, I'm assuming over purchase price. Now considering that this is a friend of yours is there wiggle room in that price? -How much of an Asuka fan are they? This can affect pricing if you know that that is a factor. -Is there any urgency to sell? I don't know where you're located so kind of difficult to offer you an estimate if different currencies are involved. Also I'm an Asuka fan so that will also skew things.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun May 12, 2013 2:31 pm I might pay up to $40 USD. Anyone else feel free to disagree.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun May 12, 2013 5:24 pm That is approximately 39.96 AUD, so the seller knows.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun May 12, 2013 9:08 pm XE.com is your friend. ;)
